records.excerpt: VOYNICH METAMORPHIC LANGUAGE (VML) — OFFICIAL FRAMEWORK DOCUMENTATION A Unified Linguistic and Operational Decoding System for MS 408 By Dmitrious Bistrevsky I. INTRODUCTION 1.1 Purpose of the VML Framework The Voynich Metamorphic Language (VML) interprets MS 408 not as an encrypted tongue but as a functional code of transformation. Within this view, each cluster of glyphs is a procedural unit—a compact instruction that governs the alteration of substance, energy, or state. Rather than transcribing speech, the manuscript encodes operations: heating, fixing, infusing, circulating, or refining. This framework provides the tools necessary to read those operations with precision. The purpose of this document is to establish a complete, self-contained grammar capable of translating every Voynich token into its operative meaning.
